rulings.Rulings: PETITION TO CONFIRM APPRAISAL AWARD DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT MAY RENEW PETITION ONCE ALL OUTSTANDING ISSUES ARE RESOLVED AND COURT CAN ISSUE FINAL JUDGMENT. (PB)

rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. REQUEST TO DISQUALIFY DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RAISING THE MATTER THROUGH A FORMAL MOTION. (CW)

TUTOR DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD AN UNLAWFUL BUSINESS PRACTICE. PLAINTIFF SHOULD SPECIFICALLY STATE THE STATUTORY BREACH. OVERRULE AS TO 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANTS PERINI & BUCKLEY DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD UNLAWFUL BUSINESS PRACTICE. PLAINTIFF SHOULD HIGHLIGHT STATUTORY BREACH. OVERRULE AS TO OTHER GROUNDS. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES INDIVIDUALS. DEFENDANTS ARE EMPLOYERS. (PB)
